title: Delicate Italian Chicken Pasta
description: A buttery and springy post-workout Italian dish featuring creme-patissiere, with a satvik-friendly twist, inspired by the Venetian cuisine and using a tandoor for a unique flavor.
instructions: Preheat the tandoor to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the fettuccine pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
Add the chicken breast to the skillet and cook until browned on both sides and cooked through.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside to rest.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter and stir in the tandoor spice mix.
Add the creme-patissiere to the skillet and stir until heated through.
Add the cooked fettuccine pasta to the skillet and toss with the creme-patissiere sauce.
Slice the cooked chicken breast into thin strips and add to the pasta.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, topped with parmesan cheese and chopped fresh parsley.
